name: auditwheel (Linux Wheel Repair Tool)

performance.notes: Wheel repair speed depends on number of shared libraries to bundle

agent_readiness.notes: Repairs Linux wheels to be manylinux-compatible. auditwheel show my-1.0-cp39-linux_x86_64.whl (inspect). auditwheel repair my-1.0-cp39-linux_x86_64.whl --plat manylinux2014_x86_64 (bundle deps). Bundles shared libraries into wheel so it runs on any Linux distro. Required step when building C extension packages on manylinux Docker images. macOS equivalent: delocate. Used inside manylinux containers (quay.io/pypa/manylinux2014_x86_64). Standard in cibuildwheel workflow.

gotchas: Must run inside manylinux container (not on bare host Linux)
Doesn't work for packages with system library dependencies (glibc, CUDA)
best_when: Making C extension wheels manylinux-compatible for PyPI upload
Inside CI pipeline after building in manylinux Docker container
Bundling shared library dependencies into portable wheel
Part of cibuildwheel workflow for Linux wheel repair
avoid_when: Packages with unavoidable system library dependencies
summary: auditwheel repairs Linux Python wheels to be manylinux-compatible for PyPI. auditwheel repair my.whl --plat manylinux2014_x86_64 bundles shared library dependencies. Must run inside manylinux Docker container. Essential step for distributing C extension packages on PyPI that run on any Linux distro. Part of standard cibuildwheel workflow. macOS equivalent: delocate.
